nasb.text: Only the Lord give you discretion and understanding, and give you charge over Israel, so that you may keep the law of the Lord your God.

esv.text: Only, may the Lord grant you discretion and understanding, that when he gives you charge over Israel you may keep the law of the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 如果你謹守遵行耶和華吩咐摩西向以色列人頒布的律例和典章，這樣你就必亨通。你要堅強勇敢，不要懼怕，也不要驚惶。

ccb.text: 愿耶和华赐你聪明和智慧，以便你照祂的律法治理以色列。
